# VIT Chennai
## VIT University FAQs
*
When was VIT Chennai established?

The Vellore Institute of Technology, Chennai campus was established in the year 2010.

*
Has UGC granted approval to VIT Chennai?

Yes, the University is approved by the University Grants Commission (UGC) & also by All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE).

*
Which body has recognised VIT University, Chennai?

The University is recognised by the BCI, AIU, ACBSP, and AACSB.

*
What is the VIT Chennai ranking by NIRF?

The University has obtained 19th rank in ‘Overall’, 10th position in the ‘University’, and 11th rank in ‘Engineering’ category by NIRF rankings 2024.

*
How can students reach the VIT Chennai campus?

The University is situated at Vandalur Kelambakkam Road, Keelakotaiyur, Chennai, Tamil Nadu. Moreover, the students can reach the location through the public, personal, and by the University’s transport facility.

*
What is the admission process of VIT Chennai?

For admission at the University, the students need to apply online through its official website.

*
How to contact the VIT Chennai to know the admission details?

The students can ask their query regarding admission at the University and other details by calling on +91 44 3993 1555 or by sending an email at [email protected].

# VIT Chennai
## About VIT Chennai - VIT University Chennai
by Neha Rathore **

Established in 2010, Vellore Institute of Technology (VIT), Chennai is a Deemed to be University. Located at Chennai, Tamil Nadu, the University is an off-campus of VIT Vellore. Moreover, the University is approved by UGC & AICTE.

The University is recognised by BCI & Association of Indian Universities (AIU), Accreditation Council for Business Schools and Programs (ACBSP), Association to Advance Collegiate Schools of Business (AACSB).

The VIT Chennai is accredited by NAAC & National Accreditation Board for Testing and Calibration Laboratories (NABL).

VIT University Chennai is known for offering a Global atmosphere to the students by providing high quality education at UG, PG, and Ph.D level at an affordable fee structure. The programs at VIT Chennai campus are available under multiple Schools including School of Computer Science and Engineering, School of Advanced Sciences, VIT Business School, and many others.

Some of the VIT Chennai rankings are listed-below:

* The NIRF ranking secured by the University in the academic year 2024 along with their categories are as follows:

+ 19th rank in ‘Overall’

+ 10th rank in ‘University’

+ 11th rank in ‘Engineering’

* As per the ‘QS World University Rankings’, the University has been ranked on a band of 791-800. Moreover, ranked 150th in the ‘QS World University Ranking’ in the ‘Asia Category’ in the academic year 2025.

* In 2024, the ‘Shanghai Ranking’ ranked the University on the band of 501-600 in the ‘Academic Ranking of World Universities’ category.

**Vision: **The Vellore Institute of Technology (VIT), Chennai envisions to transform the life of students by offering high-quality education & research.

**Mission:** The VIT University Chennai has a mission to facilitate world class education, ethics, and critical thinking to the students for their overall development. Moreover, the University aims to build a system based on innovation which will extend the boundaries of knowledge

# VIT Chennai: Admission 2025, Courses, Fees, Cutoff, Placements, Scholarships.
## VIT Chennai Courses and Fees
VIT Chennai offers various undergraduate and postgraduate programs in BTech, BSc, BBA, BCom, MCA, MTech, MBA. VIT Chennai also provides law programs such as BBALLB, BALLB and LLM. There are various specializations programs depending on the courses. The Integrated programs offered by the VIT Chennai are MSc and MTech on specializations like Physics, Chemistry, Data science and software engineering.

Along with the various programs VIT Chennai also offers PhD programs for 3 to 5 years.

VIT Chennai offers various UG programs. Given below are Duration, Fees, Eligibility criteria and Selection Criteria.

| UG Courses |
| --- |
| BTech, BSc, BBA, BCom, BALLB, BBALLB |
|

The duration of BTech, BSc, BBA, BCom is 4 years.  However, BALLB and BBA LLB have a duration of 5 years.

1st year Fees for BTech: INR 1.76 lakhs to INR 1.98 lakhs

BSc: INR 77k to 1.72 lakhs

BBA: INR 2.75 lakhs

BCom: INR 1.42 lakhs

BALLB and BBALLB: INR 1.92 lakhs

Eligibility for BTech, BBA and BCom is 60% marks, and BSc is 70% marks in in 10+2 grades. However, the eligibility criteria BALLB and BBALLB is 45% in 12th grade.

Selection Criteria for BTech is VITEEE and for BALLB and BBALLB CLAT and LSAT is accepted

Scholarship: VIT Chennai provides scholarships to the students up to 25% to 100% of the tuition fee according to the rank score in VITEEE under VITEEE- GDVSP program.

|

VIT Chennai offers various PG programs. Given below are Duration, Fees, Eligibility criteria and Selection Criteria.

| PG Courses |
| --- |
| MCA, MTech, MSc, MBA |
|

Duration of MCA, MTech, MSc, MBA is 2 Years.

1st year Fees for the MCA, MTech, MSc and MBA are INR 1.40 Lakh, INR 3.02 Lakhs, INR 60K to 80K and INR 3.51 Lakhs respectively.

Eligibility for the MCA, MTech, MSc and MBA are 60% marks in the graduation level.

Selection criteria for MCA and MTech is VITMEE and MBA is CAT, MAT, XAT etc.

|

VIT Chennai offers various PhD programs. Given below are Duration, Fees, Eligibility criteria and Selection Criteria.

| **PhD Courses** |
| --- |
|

Duration: of PhD course is 3 to 5 Years.

1st year Fees for the PhD course is INR 43k to INR 73K. However, there is an extra fee of INR 10K during Thesis Submission.

Selection criteria depend on the VITREE score by the students.

|

# Vellore Institute of Technology Chennai
## **VIT Chennai M.Tech, MBA & MCA Admission 2024**
At the postgraduate level, VIT Chennai offers M.Tech, MCA, and MBA programs. For M.Tech and MCA admissions, candidates must have a bachelor's degree in a related field with at least 60% aggregate marks. Admission is primarily through the VITMEE, a computer-based test, with final selection including an interview. GATE-qualified candidates are also eligible for M.Tech programs. Additionally, VIT Chennai offers Integrated M.Tech in Software Engineering and M.Tech by Research in various specializations. MBA admissions are based on scores from CAT, MAT, XAT, GMAT, CMAT, or NMAT, followed by essay writing and a personal interview.

# VITEEE College Fees:  Complete Details (2025)
## VIT Hostel Fee Structure (2025)
VIT provides a wide range of hostel accommodation options for students. The hostels are separate for boys and girls. Students can choose from air-conditioned (AC) and non-air-conditioned (NAC) rooms. The hostel fee depends on the room type, number of students per room, and the mess option selected—Veg, Non-Veg, or Special.

The fees listed below are for first-year male students at the VIT Vellore campus for the 2024-25 academic year (Fall and Winter semesters). The fee includes room rent, mess charges, laundry (up to 44 washes), admission fee, and refundable caution deposit.

Note: The admission fee is non-refundable. The caution deposit is refundable at the end of the course. Hostel and mess fees are not refundable in case of downgrades. Room and mess upgrades require an extra fee.

# 
###### Year of Establishment - 1984
---

Vellore Institute of Technology (VIT) is a private deemed university located in Vellore, India. Founded in 1984, as Vellore Engineering College, by G. Viswanathan the institution offers 64 Undergraduate, 35 Postgraduate, 16 Integrated, 2 Research and 2 M.Tech Industrial Programmes. It has campuses in Vellore, Amaravati, Bhopal and Chennai.

== Academics ==
VIT consolidated its disciplines into 20 Schools of Study with the addition of the VIT Law School at its Chennai campus.VIT implements the Fully Flexible Credit System (FFCS) which gives the students flexibility to make their own time tables by choosing the subjects and the faculties under whose guidance they want to study.

=== Admission ===
VIT admits bachelor students through its own engineering entrance exam, called the Vellore Institute of Technology Engineering Entrance Examination (VITEEE). It is conducted every year in the month of April and May. The exam has been conducted online since 2013 and in 2018, 212,000 students have registered. VITEEE 2021 was held on 28, 29 and 31 May.

== Rankings ==
VIT was ranked 801-1000 in the world by the Times Higher Education World University Rankings of 2020 and 201-250 in Asia. The QS World University Rankings ranked it 228 in Asia in 2020.The National Institutional Ranking Framework (NIRF) ranked VIT 28 overall in India in 2020 and 16 among universities.Among engineering colleges in India, VIT was ranked 15 in 2020 and 13 by Outlook India.

# VIT University: India’s leading private university delivers world-class education
A global leader in interdisciplinary education and research excellence

Last updated: January 26, 2026 | 14:17

GN Focus Report

2 MIN READAdd as a preferred source on Google

*[Image: Dr G. Viswanathan, Founder & Chancellor, VIT.]*

Dr G. Viswanathan, Founder & Chancellor, VIT.

VIT University is a world-class institution offering students a broad, interdisciplinary education with an international perspective.

The journey of VIT began in 1984 at Vellore, Tamil Nadu, India, as Vellore Engineering College, founded with a mission to deliver world-class education. Over the decades, it has evolved into Vellore Institute of Technology (VIT University), a multidisciplinary institution celebrated for academic quality, cutting-edge research, and strong educational value.

Today, VIT enjoys ever increasing national and international recognition. It ranks 142nd globally in Engineering & Technology, 110th in Computer Science & Information Systems, and placed in the 51–100 band for Data Science & Artificial Intelligence in the QS World University Rankings by Subject.

VIT holds the second rank in India according to the Shanghai Ranking and placed in the 501–600 band globally.

At VIT, we understand that excellence in today’s higher education landscape demands sustained interaction with the global community. We strive to create an internationally immersive educational framework and an inclusive campus culture that reflects global thought across all aspects of university life.

Operating across four vibrant campuses Vellore, Chennai, Bhopal, and Amaravati. VIT offers state-of-the-art infrastructure, advanced laboratories, and a dynamic learning ecosystem. Students from more than 70 countries choose VIT because they know it’s one of the few Indian universities that emphasise meaningful cultural and intellectual exchange.

VIT promotes diversity through international admissions, student exchange, twinning programmes, global immersion initiatives, and inclusive cultural platforms.

VIT offers a wide range of undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programmes in engineering, science, management, law, architecture, design, and the humanities, enabling students to pursue diverse interests within a strong academic framework.

Graduates are employed by leading organisations in a variety of industries, pursue advanced degrees at top graduate programmes, start their own businesses, and contribute to society in meaningful ways. VIT also advances its strategic priorities by cultivating lasting relationships with alumni, inspiring their support, fostering pride, and strengthening the university’s legacy

# VIT Chennai Campus: Photos, Virtual Tour
## VIT University Chennai Campus Facilities
The University offers various academic and extracurricular facilities to the students to facilitate them excellent academic life experience. VIT Chennai campus has smart classrooms with the required amenities like whiteboards, projectors, lecture capturing facility, etc.

The VIT Chennai campus has a ‘Mahatma Gandhi Auditorium’ which can accommodate around 2500 students. In addition to this, various other auditoriums like Nethaji and V.O.C are available with seating capacity of about 400 & 150 students, respectively. Furthermore, various other recreational facilities like a swimming pool, shopping mall, and others are also available within the campus area.

Apart from the above-mentioned facilities, many other amenities are accessible for students at the VIT Chennai campus; some of these are as follows:

* **Library: **A central library is there at the University which is built on an area of around 2322.58 sq.m and it is spread over four floors. There are around 67,063 books, 4200+ back volumes, 200+ print journals, and others.

Moreover, a digital library with an automated system is also available through which students can access various online resources. Various other facilities like reading halls, discussion rooms, reprographic facilities, and many more are also available at the library.

* **Laboratories:** The University has around 6 computer centers with approximately 673 updated PCs for academic purposes. Moreover, several departmental labs are there to provide practical knowledge to the students; some of these are Automobile Engineering laboratory, Cloud Computing laboratory, Environmental Engineering laboratory, and many more.

* **Sports: **At the University, adequate indoor & outdoor sports facilities are available. The campus comprises around 4 Badminton Courts, 1 Basketball Court, 2 Throwball Court, 2+ Cricket Practice Nets, Boards Games Hall, etc. The University encourages students to enhance their athletic skills by offering multiple sports opportunities.

* **Hostel:** The University offers hostel facilities to both girls & boys separately. The VIT Chennai Hostel rooms are fully-furnished with beds, study tables, etc. and are available in multiple occupancies.

Furthermore, a multi-cuisine mess facility is available which provides clean and hygienic meals to the students. Apart from these, there are various other facilities available for hostellers like reading rooms, entertainment halls, gym, and so on.

* **Canteen: **Canteen, bakery, and food courts are available at the VIT Chennai campus to provide food and beverages to the students at nominal prices.

* **Transportation: **The University provides transportation facilities to ensure safe pick and drop of the students. Both AC and Non-AC buses are available for the students who are coming from nearby areas of the city.

* **Medical Facilities:** A health centre is available within the campus which is managed by ‘Apollo Shine Foundation’ to provide 24/7 healthcare facility to the students. The health centre has all the required facilities like observation beds, doctors, staff nurses, etc. Also, around 2 ambulances are available for emergency purposes.

* **Gymnasium: **At the campus, both male & female students get gym facilities separately. Both the gyms have state-of-the-art equipment for the students to focus on their physical health and overall well-being.

* **Banking: **A branch of Indian Bank with ATM is available within the premises of the University for the students to access financial services

** Q:   How many faculty members does VIT Chennai have? **

**A: **

VIT Chennai has 100+ faculty members. With great experience, most of faculty members have done PhD from top colleges. Candidates can check the details of some of the faculty members of VIT Chennai:

Ques. How is hostel life at VIT Chennai?

Ans. The hostel experience at VIT Chennai is good, particularly for first-year students.

Rooms are clean and can be shared with 2-6 other people. Some rooms have AC. The mess food is average - it depends on which hostel you are located in. The campus has a gym, with a night canteen, and a lot of fun stuff going on. The campus is well-maintained and safe.

However, there are rules to follow. You have to get back to the hostel by 9 p.m. The bathrooms are shared, and they aren't always clean. Hostel fees and mess fees can be a bit high.

According to reviews on Reddit and Quora, most students stay in the hostel in their first year and then move to PG or rented rooms, so you have more autonomy.

Ques. Is VIT Vellore better than VIT Chennai?

Ans. VIT Vellore is generally better than VIT Chennai according to student reviews, but both are good choices. Here's a simple comparison to help you decide:

Ques. What are the courses and programs offered by VIT Chennai?

Ans. VIT Chennai offers 19 undergraduate, 18 postgraduate, 3 integrated M.Tech, research programs, and full-time/part-time PhD options across engineering, management, science, arts, and law.

The university supports interdisciplinary learning with various electives, minors, and value-added programs.

Ques. Is it worth studying at VIT Chennai?

Ans. VIT Chennai is a great college after 12th grade. Here are some reasons why:

* It has a good rank among private colleges in India.

* Many good companies like Microsoft, TCS and Intel pick up students from here.

* The salaries are good, especially in the Computer Science and Information Technology streams (above INR 6 LPA or INR 10 LPA).

* The college has comparatively new buildings, labs and other facilities.

* There is also international exposure; at least you get the opportunity to participate in student exchange programs.

* There are many courses available, including unique ones like Fashion Technology.

Things to consider:

* Placements work out better for CS and IT branches.

* There are a lot of rules to follow in college.

* There may be fewer salary offers for some branches

Overall, VIT Chennai is worth it for students who want good placements and a quality education.

# Vellore Institute of Technology (VIT)
## About
Read more

Read less

Founded in 1984 by Dr. G. Viswanathan – the Chancellor of the university –** Vellore Institute of Technology (VIT)** is one of India’s premier institutions. Since 1984, the student body has grown from 180 students to 38,000 students from across the world.

There are four campuses in India: Vellore, Chennai, Amaravati, and Bhopal.

Eco-friendly in design and equipped with cutting-edge infrastructure, they provide a favorable atmosphere for learning and living.

VIT has developed a student-centered success culture and ensures high quality learning, teaching and research experiences. The university offers a range of world class extracurricular facilities and support to students, as well as a strong Alumni Network.

India’s Government gave VIT Institution of Eminence (IoE) status in recognition of its excellence in research and academics.
VIT has recorded a consistent increase in the quality and quantity of research publications.

Recognition from Web of Science (WoS), the world’s most trusted database for the “India Research Excellence – Citation Awards 2019” under the Deemed or Private University category. VIT is the first Indian institution to receive QS four star in overall category and five stars in teaching, employability, facilities, innovation and inclusiveness.

Three VIT subjects are within the top 550 QS World University Rankings by Subject: CS & IT; Electrical & Electronics; Chemistry. VIT has national accreditation from National Assessment and Accreditation Council (NAAC), Govt. of India with A grade. Programs at VIT are taught in English, but VIT also has the Chinese Language Centre.

To find out more about the institution, please check out the following platforms: **VIT website**; **Facebook**; **Twitter**;** Instagram**; **LinkedIn**; **YouTube**.

**

*[Image]*

**

*[Image]*

+33 More

Facilities

VIT offers:

* State-of-the-art laboratories
* VIT mentors students through initiatives including the Fully Flexible Credit System (FFCS) ™, Curriculum for Applied Learning (CAL) ™ and Project-Based Learning (PBL).
* VIT provides seed money to carry out research in emerging and socially relevant fields.

VIT has 200 student clubs and chapters, student counsellors, grievance cell, woman grievance cell, student mentoring system, digital library, digital parents monitoring systems, 24/7 security on campus and accommodation.

Student life

VIT has 31,107 national students and 1,215 international students with 55+ countries represented.
There are 45 languages spoken on campus, contributing to the university’s rich and cultural diversity.

VIT has extra-curricular facilities, sports and cultural activities, around 200 clubs and chapters, and college festivals. Find out more **here**.

Students can choose on-campus accommodation while studying at VIT. Follow the **link** to learn more.

Admission

Admission is based on merit and course availability. NRI candidates can apply in two ways: direct admission and through VITEEE.
Whereas foreign students will need to take a slightly different approach. Find out about the admissions procedure **here**.

Scholarships are available for some of the countries like Nepal, Bhutan, and Bangladesh.

Careers

VIT consistently places more than ninety percent of students in reputed companies:

* 6921 Total offers, 3087 **Super Dream** Offers (**Placements** + **Internships**)
* 41.6 LPA Highest CTC and 7. 25 LPA average CTC (as of now).

Some super dream companies include:

* Microsoft PPO
* Amazon
*  Mech Mocha
* RazorPay
* Appdynamics India Pvt Ltd
* Tolram Group (International)
*  Paypal
* Onedirect

Learn more about VIT’s high placement record **here**.

VIT’s Placement Centre brings more than 700 companies to campus for recruitment purposes. VIT has strong **alumni network** worldwide

# VIT Chennai’s Vibrance 2024 to host int’l students this year
City

| TNN | Mar 6, 2024, 04:45 IST

**Share

Follow us **

Chennai: Vellore Institute of Technology (VIT), Chennai, is set to host the eighth edition of its annual cultural and sports extravaganza, Vibrance 2024, from March 6 to 9.

Expecting a record-breaking turnout, Vibrance 2024 anticipates more than 20,000 student participants, a significant increase from last year’s 10,000.

International students from countries such as Japan, Sri Lanka, Myanmar among others are expected to join their Indian counterparts from prestigious institutions such as IITs, NITs, and Anna University.

More than 100 cultural events are planned for the four-day festival, alongside more than 40 different sports and games. Sports enthusiasts can look forward to competitions such as handball, throwball, squash, snooker, futsal, tennis, flag football, badminton, hockey, and table tennis. The event boasts a total prize pool of 10 lakh for its mega events.

The event will be inaugurated by Indian cricketer Dinesh Karthik, followed by a musical performance by playback singer Shreya Ghoshal. Vibrance 2024 also features singers Andrea Jeremiah (Day 2) and Jonita Gandhi (Day 3) alongside captivating dance performances.

The festival concludes with a DJ night, DJ Lost Stories and DJ Danika and a closing ceremony featuring actor Sonu Sood on Saturday.

The annual festival is beyond a competition, Sekar said. Around 500 students have volunteered to organise this year’s festival.

“While academic excellence remains our top priority, Vibrance provides a unique platform for students to broaden their horizons by engaging with international participants,” director of student welfare V Rajasekaran said.

This year’s edition, with Times of India as the official media partner, promises to be bigger and better than ever before, as the college prepares to welcome international students for the first time in the event’s history, according to VIT vice-president Sekar Viswanathan
